column1: Estimations are made for L2+ developer level
Only front-end part of the application (web development) was estimated. Back-End and/or Mobile (native/cross-platform) estimates are not included.
Before Front-End implementation is started, we assume that Styleguides, governance and UX design are available and ready for use
UX design implementation estimates are not included and should be done separately by UX team
Business and Technical stakeholders are available throughout the Discovery phase to provide clarifications on business/technical requirements
UI pages will be adaptive for different desktop screen resolutions (without mobile, tablet support (no touch support))
Localization will be supported for texts, dates without RTL/Hieroglyphs
Application looks like internal business portal, so we do not estimate any effort on GDPR or other governance regulations, SEO optimizations and Accessibility
For more cases, please, look at the tab "Typical Assumptions"
Look at the tab "Dev Effort Multiplicators" to calibrate % based on project
Browsers supported matrix: (Chrome, Mozilla, IE Edge, Safari)
Analytics and site metrics collection (GTM integration, etc.)
Unknown final UX design of the screens
Communication/process overhead (meetings, scrum ceremonies, code review, tasks discussions, etc.)
